changes_made: Minimal. Added a comma after 'At least' for TTS pacing — the micro-beat before 'that's what she wrote' lets the implication land before the audience finishes processing it. The self-incriminating structure is already doing all the work. No further changes needed.
caption_notes: Two cards. Setup: "My wife thinks I don't respect her privacy." Punchline: "At least, that's what she wrote in her diary." The punchline card should appear alone — the joke detonates on the word 'diary' and the caption needs space around it.
timing_notes: Setup casual, throwaway — like a man mildly defending himself. 0.4s pause. Punchline starts confident, loses steam on 'diary' — the last word is where the speaker realizes they've just confessed. Slight drop in delivery on the final word if voice acting allows.
